responsibilities: Design and create tools for availability and latency detection to minimize MTTD and MTTR for Vanguard applications running on AWS.
Onboard and support new mission critical products to IST Run team and setup relevant SLO, SLI.
Troubleshooting and debugging application running on Linux. Investigate exceptions and stack traces in log aggregation tools.
Investigate CDN, network issue on TCP/IP stacks and websockets with DevOpSec team.
Perform data integrity and data reconciliation by developing python script to query dynamoDB and api/graphql backend, monitoring SSL certs expiration.
Produce python script for automation and toil elimination.
Supervise and script performance tests against restAPI and GraphQL in Locust.
Chair forums for developers to improve DX and self service portals.
Provide reports on incident trends and self-healing event ratio.
Recruit and interview junior members of the IST RUN global team (UK, Australia, US).
Validate DOCKERFILE and investigate container logs for incident analysis.
Lead multi-region and multi-availability zone DR tests projects.

work_experience.job_title: Senior System Specialist, Smarts Market Surveillance and Buyside Sybenetix technologies
responsibilities: Devops: Introduce Smarts CI/CD tools to buyside surveillance platform. Develop and update puppet modules, manifests and hiera to manage server build, system deployment and configuration control.

Application Support: Support Nasdaq buyside survelliance software in a hybrid linux and windows platform running docker containers. Support both Nasdaq associated exchanges' and regulators' smarts market surveillance software.
Database Admin: Design and build a Postgresql database cluster that conform with NASDAQ inforsec standard. Investigate Data issues with business analysts through querying and updating psql database.
Act as deputy Technical Operation Manager. Manage incidents, problems, changes and releases. Bring integrated production to SOC2 Complaint.
Design and Implement an on-prem multi-master k8s cluster.
Technical Lead for various projects.

work_experience.company: Fidessa PLC, Hosted Exchange and Ticker Plant Division
responsibilities: Ticker Plant implementation and software release management: Integrate regional configuration for European based Ticker Plant Systems on Unix/Linux platforms. Shell script tasks for weekend production software rollout.
Client on boarding and troubleshooting: Provide and document interactive trading connections and market data to clients using Fidessa hosted software.
End to end network testing, connectivity verification and ACL, NAT troubleshooting.
Coordinate network and hardware changes with regional data centres for project, such as exchange DR tests.
Technical lead for projects and owner of client change requests.

work_experience.job_title: Product Specialist and Test Support Analyst, sell-side
responsibilities: Test and demo environments support: Provide a stable and highly available test, staging and demo environment for testers and marketing demonstrators.
Install and configure the backend of Fidessa sell side products known as hosted Integrated Trading Platform (ITP/ETP) and components (OMAR, TMAR, PMAC, EMMA, CTAC, FDA).

ITP software release and installation: Release software from developers to software library and resource centre. Script and automate part of software release flow using Bourne and C shell. Install and maintain latest release candidates using Perforce.
Exchange connectivity and broker network setup: Configure exchange interactive gateway/service on Fidessa backend systems running on Solaris and Linux.
Update FIX simulator, FIX portal and configure FIX connections to express hub, a broker network.
Enable user market routes to permit different levels of market data access.

work_experience.job_title: Common Platform Implementation and Support Specialist / Team Leader
responsibilities: Cross Platform Support: Look after the whole integration and QA environments hosted in UK, Singapore and US. Provide day to day 3rd line support. Schedule, coordinate and support software release cycles.

Reuters Eikon pillar software implementation and support: Follow the Reuters Proposition Delivery breaking the work into six key pillars (Hosted RMDS, Search, AAA DACS, etc.). Build the six key pillars into a working platform for the integration testing phase.
Coordinate with the pillar development, QA groups and Operations at a technical level. Help integration system users understand the system to deliver and debug their applications.
Work with the CP pillars, architects, shared infrastructure and Operations on technical requirements, design, documentation, implementation, project management, and release processes.
Generate and provide jumpstart configuration and help Operations to deploy it across live production environments.
Process creation and co-ordination: Assist management of day to day co-ordination between team members in APAC and AMERS.
Create OS patching process with IBM BigFix and AV update processes with McAfee ePolicy Orchestrator.
Software Installation Automation: Automate server installation and software deployment from bare metal PXE boot.

work_experience.job_title: Real Time System Engineer / Network and Server Infrastructure Engineer
responsibilities: Real-time Systems support: Analyse FIX messages and logs for troubleshooting. Plan, install, monitor and support of a real-time global financial data and trading system.
Manage incidents on real time data and trading products such as RSP services to various trading counterparts.
Market Data Feed support: Application support to Thomson Financial market data feed software and global data distribution.
Network and Server Infrastructure Engineering: Server and Network installation and support.
